title: Choose a Consistency Model
description: Decide between strong and eventual consistency.
content:
For this data and these operations: {{scenario}}

Decide what consistency you actually need. Where would a stale or out-of-order read cause real harm (money, safety, correctness) versus merely look odd briefly? Recommend strong, eventual, or a mix per operation, and the mechanism (transactions, quorums, versioning, CRDTs). State the latency and availability cost of the choice. Flag where developers will assume stronger guarantees than the system provides.
